name: feat-ESE-24
title: Tilemap visual carving — rebuild tile geometry from density grid
description: After carving, rebuild tile visual geometry from density grid so carved holes are visible. Uses renderCarvedChunks to replace tile meshes with merged quad mesh from solid density cells.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Carved holes visible in tile rendering
- Background shows through carved areas
- Collision edges match visual boundaries
demoDeliverable: Screenshot showing tiles with visible carved holes — background visible through carved areas.
testingScenarios:
- Carved tiles show holes visually
- Collision edges align with visual boundaries
- Reset clears carved visuals
stakeholderUnderstanding: Visual carving — tile meshes now match collision meshes.
